title: О ПОРЯДКЕ ВОЗЛОЖЕНИЯ НА РАБОТНИКА ОГРАНИЧЕННОЙ МАТЕРИАЛЬНОЙ ОТВЕТСТВЕННОСТИ
author: Д.А. Новиков
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article examines the history of the development of the legislation regulating the procedure for imposing on the worker of limited material liability. The necessity to change the existing order imposing on the worker of limited liability. It is proposed to provide exceptional court procedure for imposing on the worker the limited liability.
steps_raw: The article examines the history of the development of the legislation regulating the procedure for imposing on the worker of limited material liability. The necessity to change the existing order imposing on the worker of limited liability. It is proposed to provide exceptional court procedure for imposing on the worker the limited liability.
keywords: procedure to attract an employee to material liability
